series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with accident investigation and incident reports created by Natural Resources and Wildlife Officers that are non-criminal in nature, including but not limited to accident reports, incident reports (including preliminary), inspections, crash reports, injury reports, coroner’s reports, narrative supplements, photographs, audio or video recordings (including body-worn camera footage), correspondence, supplements, relevant attachments to these reports, various logs, witness statements, inventory sheets, self-reporting accident reports (BAR), tow releases, Watercraft Incident Casualty Reports, property damage reports, and requests for assistance. This schedule applies to investigation of non-criminal incidents, which can include civil and administrative investigations.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: following close of investigation. ; Paper: following close of investigation. If records are microfilmed or scanned into an electronic format, paper copy may be shredded at that time. ; Electronic: following close of investigation. If records are microfilmed, electronic copy may be deleted
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
